events.title: Brian May turns 79
events.blurb: Queen guitarist Brian May celebrates his 79th birthday.

angles.name: Brian May Birthday
angles.copy: The legendary guitarist for Queen, Brian May, turns 79 this Sunday. What's your favourite Queen track to crank up?

events.title: Mick Jagger turns 83
events.blurb: The iconic Rolling Stones frontman Mick Jagger celebrates his 83rd birthday.

angles.name: Mick Jagger Birthday
angles.copy: Eighty-three years young and still rocking stadiums! Mick Jagger celebrates his birthday this Sunday. What's your ultimate Stones anthem?

events.title: MTV launched 45 years ago
events.blurb: Music Television (MTV) launched on August 1, 1981, with The Buggles' 'Video Killed The Radio Star' as its first video.

angles.name: MTV Launch Anniversary
angles.copy: Forty-five years ago this week, MTV launched, changing music forever. The first video? The Buggles declaring 'Video Killed The Radio Star'. Did it?

events.title: Oasis' 'Definitely Maybe' turns 32
events.blurb: Oasis released their debut album 'Definitely Maybe' on August 5, 1994.

angles.name: Definitely Maybe Anniversary
angles.copy: Thirty-two years ago this week, Oasis dropped 'Definitely Maybe', an album that defined a generation. What's your favourite track from it?

events.title: Woodstock Festival 57th anniversary
events.blurb: The iconic Woodstock Music & Art Fair began on August 15, 1969, in Bethel, New York.

angles.name: Woodstock Anniversary
angles.copy: Fifty-seven years ago this month, half a million people descended on a dairy farm for Woodstock. A defining moment in music history. What would you have loved to see there?

events.title: 49 years since Elvis Presley's passing
events.blurb: August 16, 2026, marks 49 years since the death of rock and roll legend Elvis Presley.

angles.name: Elvis Death Anniversary
angles.copy: Forty-nine years ago this week, the world lost The King. Elvis Presley's legacy endures. What's the Elvis track you can't live without?

events.title: 30 years since Tupac Shakur was shot
events.blurb: September 1, 2026, marks 30 years since Tupac Shakur was shot in Las Vegas.

angles.name: Tupac Anniversary
angles.copy: Three decades ago this week, the music world was shaken when Tupac Shakur was shot in Las Vegas. His influence continues to be felt across genres.

events.title: 56 years since Jimi Hendrix's passing
events.blurb: September 2, 2026, marks 56 years since the death of guitar icon Jimi Hendrix.

angles.name: Jimi Hendrix Anniversary
angles.copy: Fifty-six years ago this week, the legendary Jimi Hendrix left us. His innovative guitar work redefined rock music forever.

events.title: The Beatles' 'Abbey Road' turns 57
events.blurb: The Beatles released their iconic album 'Abbey Road' on September 4, 1969.

angles.name: Abbey Road Anniversary
angles.copy: Fifty-seven years ago this week, The Beatles gave us 'Abbey Road'. That album cover, those songs... pure genius. What's your favourite from it?

events.title: Chrissie Hynde turns 75
events.blurb: The Pretenders' frontwoman Chrissie Hynde celebrates her 75th birthday.

angles.name: Chrissie Hynde Birthday
angles.copy: Happy 75th birthday to the incredible Chrissie Hynde! The Pretenders' legend still commands the stage. What's your go-to Pretenders track?

events.title: Liam Gallagher turns 54
events.blurb: Former Oasis frontman Liam Gallagher celebrates his 54th birthday.

angles.name: Liam Gallagher Birthday
angles.copy: Our Kid, Liam Gallagher, turns 54 this week. Still bringing the rock and roll swagger. What's your favourite Liam moment?

events.title: John Lennon's 'Imagine' turns 51
events.blurb: John Lennon released his iconic single 'Imagine' on October 1, 1975.

angles.name: Imagine Anniversary
angles.copy: Fifty-one years ago this week, John Lennon gave the world 'Imagine'. A timeless anthem for peace and unity. What does that song mean to you?

events.title: The first iPod released 25 years ago
events.blurb: Apple released the original iPod on October 3, 2001, revolutionising portable music.

angles.name: iPod Anniversary
angles.copy: Remember the first iPod? Twenty-five years ago this week, Apple launched the device that put '1,000 songs in your pocket' and changed how we listened to music forever. What was on your first iPod?

events.title: Happy James Bond Day
events.blurb: October 5th is celebrated as James Bond Day, marking the anniversary of the first Bond film's premiere.

angles.name: James Bond Day
angles.copy: It's James Bond Day! From Connery to Craig, who's your favourite 007 and what's the ultimate Bond theme tune?

events.title: John Lennon would have been 86
events.blurb: Legendary Beatles member John Lennon would have celebrated his 86th birthday.

angles.name: John Lennon Birthday
angles.copy: The visionary John Lennon would have been 86 this week. His music and message continue to inspire generations. What's your favourite Lennon song?

events.title: John Cleese turns 87
events.blurb: Iconic comedian and actor John Cleese celebrates his 87th birthday.

angles.name: John Cleese Birthday
angles.copy: The one and only John Cleese turns 87 this week! From Monty Python to Fawlty Towers, a true British comedy icon. What's your favourite John Cleese moment?

events.title: The Beatles' 'White Album' turns 58
events.blurb: The Beatles released their self-titled double album, commonly known as 'The White Album', on November 2, 1968.

angles.name: White Album Anniversary
angles.copy: Fifty-eight years ago this week, The Beatles unleashed 'The White Album'. A sprawling, eclectic masterpiece. Which track from it is your desert island pick?
